title: Mossel Bay's Sussex Cricket Club gives George a walloping
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Sussex Cricket Club A...
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Sussex Cricket Club A team hosted George Cricket Club in their first Premier League home fixture of the 2024/25 season.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Sussex Cricket Club A team hosted George Cricket Club in their first Premier League home fixture of the 2024/25 season."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"George won the toss and opted to bowl first in what seemed to be favourable bowling conditions at the D'Almeida cricket ground in Mossel Bay on Saturday, 2 November","html":"George won the toss and opted to bowl first in what seemed to be favourable bowling conditions at the D'Almeida cricket ground in Mossel Bay on Saturday, 2 November"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"In a repeat of the previous match last week the Sussex innings started off at a pedestrian pace and they were on 19/2 after eight overs.","html":"In a repeat of the previous match last week the Sussex innings started off at a pedestrian pace and they were on 19/2 after eight overs."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Partnership"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The third wicket partnership of 73 runs between the workhorse captain, Rowan Groenewald (39 runs), and young gun Heath Richards (30 runs) shifted the momentum in Sussex's favour.","html":"The third wicket partnership of 73 runs between the workhorse captain, Rowan Groenewald (39 runs), and young gun Heath Richards (30 runs) shifted the momentum in Sussex's favour."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Heath is a SWD T20 player and recently played for the Mumbai Indians of New York in Major League Cricket, the United States' professional T20 league.","html":"Heath is a SWD T20 player and recently played for the Mumbai Indians of New York in Major League Cricket, the United States' professional T20 league."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Heath Richards, Lindl Trimm (35 runs off 27 balls) and Ravin-Lee Kemmies (43 runs off 31 balls) provided an injection in the scoring rate in the second part of the innings, scoring at more than a 100% strike rate.","html":"Heath Richards, Lindl Trimm (35 runs off 27 balls) and Ravin-Lee Kemmies (43 runs off 31 balls) provided an injection in the scoring rate in the second part of the innings, scoring at more than a 100% strike rate."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sussex eventually ended their innings on 238/8 after 50 overs.","html":"Sussex eventually ended their innings on 238/8 after 50 overs."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"In trouble"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The George team found themselves in trouble early on as they were on 42/4 in the 11th over. Constant fall of wickets","html":"The George team found themselves in trouble early on as they were on 42/4 in the 11th over. Constant fall of wickets"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The innings never gained momentum, due to the constant fall of wickets.","html":"The innings never gained momentum, due to the constant fall of wickets."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sussex's combined team bowling effort was exemplary, with all the bowlers chipping in and taking wickets. Heath and Ravin-Lee were in top form, picking up three wickets each.","html":"Sussex's combined team bowling effort was exemplary, with all the bowlers chipping in and taking wickets. Heath and Ravin-Lee were in top form, picking up three wickets each."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"George were dismissed for 120 runs in the 36th over.","html":"George were dismissed for 120 runs in the 36th over."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Bonus point"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sussex secured a bonus point, with the victory margin of 118 runs.","html":"Sussex secured a bonus point, with the victory margin of 118 runs."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The match followed a similar trend as the first game of the season and the team is looking to continue building momentum.","html":"The match followed a similar trend as the first game of the season and the team is looking to continue building momentum."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Groenewald thanked the supporters who encouraged the team and invited them to the next home game against the league champions, Pacaltsdorp CC, on 16 November.","html":"Groenewald thanked the supporters who encouraged the team and invited them to the next home game against the league champions, Pacaltsdorp CC, on 16 November."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Sussex A team is travelling to Knysna tomorrow, Saturday 9 November, to face Knysna Cavaliers.","html":"The Sussex A team is travelling to Knysna tomorrow, Saturday 9 November, to face Knysna Cavaliers."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The B team is playing away in George against Thembalethu B on Sunday, 10 November.","html":"The B team is playing away in George against Thembalethu B on Sunday, 10 November."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The winning Sussex A team. BELOW: Heath Richards.","html":"The winning Sussex A team. BELOW: Heath Richards.
"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
